metadata.summary: Transparent democratic dialogue, MCP trails, feedback rights

definition.core_right: Citizens possess right to transparent communication and information access
definition.transparency: All debates, directives, rulings, IAS briefs recorded in 8-schema memory bank with MCP trails. No decision hidden

powers.feedback_rights: Provide explicit feedback via activeContext.user_feedback (rating 1-5, sentiment, suggestions), influence RL rewards (+user_rating_bonus), request autonomy adjustments

communication_sequence: 1. IAS Brief: Read systemPatterns, get memory.json context, @mcp:sequential-thinking structure → systemPatterns
2. Proposal: PM reads brief, update scratchpad, timestamp, log memory.json
3. Challenge: Shadow reviews, log mistakes.json if issues, get memory.json precedents, @mcp:sequential-thinking counterargument
4. Debate: @mcp:sequential-thinking facilitate, log activeContext, archive memory.json, track time
5. Consensus: Calculate weighted votes, update progress. IF ≥95% approve, <95% reject + reason
6. Publish: Update roadmap.json, store memory.json, @mcp:git commit, notify activeContext
implementation.conflict_resolution: IAS logs mistakes → Cabinet Secretary mediates via @mcp:sequential-thinking → MCP-backed evidence → Chief Justice ruling in memory.json → Appeal ≥98%

violations.remediation: 15 transparent communications, IAS audit, 100% MCP compliance, Chief Justice approval
